name: claw-bridge
description: Publishes editor-only signals (workspace, selection, diagnostics, symbols, vscode.lm models, MCP config) to Claw Deck over localhost. Claw Deck connects when present and degrades to filesystem+git when absent.

clawBridge.port.description: Localhost port the bridge listens on (must match Claw Deck's clawBridgePort setting).
